Name: VersionDistinctionName
Description: A name for the Version Distinction.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the Version Distinction.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the Version Distinction.

Name: EffectivePeriod
Description: Clarifies when the identification information is accurate.

Name: RegExp
Description: Allows the version structure to be defined by a regular expression.
